data.name: Tropical Blessings 🌴
data.detailed_description:
It’s just another day at the beach for Kammy, at least at first. In love with the sand and the sun, she’s ready for relaxation. But when that hot stranger gets her attention, Kammy realizes she’s hungry for something more. Will he be easy to seduce? And will she show him what it’s like to have a woman with a lil extra to give?

Key Features

• Visual Novel about sexual adventures on tropical islands

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Guy fucked by Futa Girl 

• Girl's and Guy's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Kammy loves the sun. She especially loves the beach! But nothing beats ‘sex on the beach’, now does it? And that’s something Kammy is really good at! Now if she can just convince this sexy stranger that he wants what Futa Kammy is offering.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
